metadata.note: ClaimId reuse across different sources (c1, c2 appear multiple times bound to different sourceUrls); not strict (claimType, field, sourceUrl) duplicates but flagged for downstream dedupe normalization.

unresolveds: claimId reuse: 'c1', 'c2', 'a2_c1' are reused across multiple sources/claims; downstream dedupe should namespace by sourceUrl to prevent collision.
verdictSummary: Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims and zero PUBLIC_SAFE_NO_PUBLIC_OPPORTUNITY claims. All 30 ledger entries are appropriately classified as FUTURE_LANE_ONLY (careers, nurse residency, GME footer signals) or HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED (community volunteer program, credentialing services, ambiguous footers). No scope conflicts, no overclaims, no public-safety risk. Outcome reflects genuine absence of a public physician USCE offering on captured pages — safe to publish as null-USCE.
